name: Kering (Gucci, Balenciaga, Brioni, AlexMcQ)
message: [AI generated] Kering is a global luxury group that manages the development of renowned houses in fashion, such as Gucci, Balenciaga, Brioni, and Alexander McQueen. These brands are popular in clothing, leather goods, footwear, and accessories sector. Kering, based in Paris, France, empowers its brands to reach their potential in the most imaginative and sustainable manner.
